# First Church of Springfield

> A welcoming church in downtown Springfield. This file orients AI crawlers to
> the site's key pages. Regenerate after launch with `npm run llms:full`, and
> replace this description with the church's own one-liner.

## Key pages
- [Plan a Visit](https://www.example-church.org/worship/): Service time, what to expect, parking, kids, accessibility
- [What We Believe](https://www.example-church.org/what-we-believe/): The faith this church shares
- [Sermons](https://www.example-church.org/sermons/): Watch recent messages or join worship live online
- [Events](https://www.example-church.org/events/): Weekly rhythms and upcoming gatherings
- [Music](https://www.example-church.org/music/): The church's musical life
- [Pastor & Staff](https://www.example-church.org/pastor-staff/): The people you'll meet
- [Give](https://www.example-church.org/give/): Online and by-mail giving
- [Weddings](https://www.example-church.org/weddings/): Getting married in the sanctuary
- [Use Our Space](https://www.example-church.org/use-our-space/): Renting the building
- [Contact](https://www.example-church.org/contact/): Address, office hours, who to reach
